title: Precision electronics inspection enclosure
purpose: A printable enclosure for a small sensor or controller board with lid removal, probe, calibration-key, USB-C, airflow, and status-light interfaces.

checks.claim: The source declares millimetres and asserts the allowed part selector and core dimensional relationships.
The design-level CSG is one difference of positive_volume minus negative_space.
The 0.35 mm per-side lid skirt clearance and 3 mm walls target ordinary FDM process variation; printer-specific fit testing is required.
Blind M2 pilot geometry and F1BM3 insert holes use nominal library/tool dimensions; verify against the selected screws, inserts, material, and slicer.
The split locating skirt, support-free horizontal channels, and airflow slots are intended to improve printability and service access.
No structural integrity, ingress protection, thermal performance, electrical safety, or manufacturability guarantee is made.
